headline: Alexa Plus is getting an AI update to handle more complicated instructions
summary: Amazon's Alexa Plus is receiving an AI update for complex instructions. It will connect to smart home devices from multiple brands like Bosch and Yale. The update is currently in preview, expanding Alexa's smart home capabilities.

headline: The Echo Show 21 is a great smart home hub that’s $80 off
summary: The Echo Show 21 combines a smart calendar, kitchen TV, and smart home hub. It features a large 21-inch screen for controlling devices and entertainment. Best Buy and Home are currently offering the device for $80 off.

headline: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr’s war on the First Amendment
summary: FCC Chairman Brendan Carr is accused of suppressing free speech rights. He reportedly targeted broadcasters for jokes about the president after Donald Trump's second term. Critics argue his actions misuse authority over TV, radio, and internet.

headline: Claude’s voice mode is now available for Opus and Sonnet
summary: Claude's voice mode is now available for its Opus and Sonnet AI models. Previously, this feature was exclusive to the faster Claude Haiku. Anthropic is also integrating voice mode into apps like Gmail, Slack, and Canva.

headline: Seth Green’s Star Wars: Detours Will Finally See the Light of Day
summary: Seth Green's animated Star Wars sitcom, Detours, will finally be released. A selection of episodes will be exhibited at the new Lucas Museum. This marks the long-awaited debut of the previously unreleased series.

headline: Zach Cregger Provides Update on Aunt Gladys Prequel at Comic Con 2026
summary: Director Zach Cregger confirmed the "Weapons" prequel focusing on Aunt Gladys is in progress. He stated the script is currently being written. The film is expected to feature many twists, turns, and mysteries.

headline: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender Director Addresses Concept Photo Leaks at Comic Con 2026
summary: The director of Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender addressed early concept photo leaks. This discussion occurred during the San Diego Comic-Con 2026 panel. Key announcements from the panel were also shared.

headline: League of Legends Riftbound TCG: First Impressions of the Vendetta Booster Set | IGN Preview
summary: IGN provides first impressions of the League of Legends Riftbound TCG. The preview focuses on the upcoming "Vendetta" booster set. It offers an early look at the new expansion for the trading card game.

headline: US hits dozens of trading partners with new wave of tariffs
summary: The US has imposed a new wave of tariffs on dozens of trading partners. These levies are cited due to concerns about forced labor practices. They replace a temporary global duty that was struck down by the US Supreme Court.

headline: Fifty women come forward saying they were pressured into swinging
summary: Fifty women have reported being pressured or coerced into swinging. The women shared their experiences with the BBC. Their testimonies highlight troubling issues of consent within relationships.

headline: PM to spend first day working from northern branch of No 10
summary: The Prime Minister will begin working from the new northern branch of No 10. Various ministers are also slated to work regularly from this satellite office. This move signifies a shift in government working locations.

headline: UK complacent about war threat, warns BAE boss
summary: The boss of BAE, Dr. Charles Woodburn, warns of UK complacency towards war. He states that the threat of attack has never been higher. BAE is Europe's largest defense contractor.
